story: Kent took Lyric to the fair, got her cotton candy, and stopped at a bottles game with a huge teddy bear prize. Another man, Jack, was already trying. Jack fingered his last bills and thought of his daughter’s birthday tomorrow; the big bear looked like the one she’d lost. This was the last big bear for the night. Kent and Jack kept paying and missing. Lyric got bored, but Kent said, “One more pass.” Kent wound up and finally knocked all the bottles down. The barker handed him the plush bear.
implausible_knowledge: Jack fingered his last bills and thought of his daughter’s birthday tomorrow; the big bear looked like the one she’d lost. This was the last big bear for the night.
question: What will Kent do with the prize now?
